risks.title: Security file modifications require validation
risks.evidence: Security.tsx modified with high relevance score (0.95) at 2026-04-27T19:02:39Z; this is a sensitive authentication/permissions component
risks.recommendedAction: Review changes in Security.tsx and run security test suite to validate no vulnerabilities were introduced

risks.title: Event deduplication failure in monitoring system
risks.evidence: Same file logged 4 times across 2 pairs of near-identical timestamps (19:02:39.030/029 and 19:02:22.477/476); events tagged as duplicates but still reported
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate code-observer event pipeline to eliminate duplicate logging and reduce alert noise

opportunities.title: Strengthen security module test coverage
opportunities.evidence: Active development on Security.tsx indicates mature component worth robust testing
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add/review automated security tests for Security.tsx in CI/CD pipeline

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx modifications
taskCandidates.description: Examine recent changes to /home/riad/github/kairos/src/screens/Security.tsx to verify security best practices and absence of vulnerabilities
taskCandidates.rationale: High-relevance changes to authentication/security component need immediate review

taskCandidates.title: Fix event deduplication in code-observer
taskCandidates.description: Implement client-side deduplication to suppress identical events within 100ms window based on source/file
taskCandidates.rationale: Prevents false alert escalation and monitoring noise from duplicate events

recommendations.title: Establish controlled change process for security files
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is a critical component; unvalidated changes risk authentication/authorization issues
recommendations.action: Require security tests and review approval for modifications to src/screens/Security.tsx and similar auth-related files

recommendations.title: Deduplicate monitoring events with millisecond precision
recommendations.rationale: Current event logging creates duplicate alerts that obscure genuine issues
recommendations.action: Add deduplication window to code-observer: suppress events with identical (source, file, classification) within 500ms of prior event

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx modifications
